name: Conversation tree
goal: Compact prev/next branch picker for forked LLM conversations — controls for selecting among regenerated responses with N / M indicator.
description: Inline pill control rendering a prev arrow, an index/total counter, and a next arrow. Used to switch among forked or regenerated responses in chat surfaces. Emits ce-branch-prev / ce-branch-next on directional clicks plus a unified ce-branch-select on every change. Supports ArrowLeft / ArrowRight keyboard navigation when focused.

props.name: index
props.description: 1-based current branch index; clamped to [1, total].

props.name: total
props.description: Total branch count. Values below 1 are treated as 1, effectively disabling both buttons.

props.name: label
props.description: Optional descriptive label rendered before the controls (e.g. "Response").

events.name: ce-branch-prev
events.description: Fires after the index decreases by one. Detail carries the NEW index. Not fired when prev is disabled.

events.name: ce-branch-next
events.description: Fires after the index increases by one. Detail carries the NEW index. Not fired when next is disabled.

events.name: ce-branch-select
events.description: Fires on every change (prev OR next) so hosts can subscribe to a single event.

slots.description: Overrides the auto-generated "N / M" counter content (e.g. a custom label like "Branch B of 3").

cssVariables.name: --ce-focus-ring
cssVariables.description: Focus-visible ring on the host and buttons.

cssVariables.name: --ce-space-2
cssVariables.description: Gap between elements and outer horizontal padding.

a11y.role: (none — host is a generic focusable container)
a11y.notes: The host receives tabindex="0" on connect and listens for ArrowLeft / ArrowRight. Each inner button has an aria-label ("Previous branch" / "Next branch"). The counter span uses aria-live="polite" so screen readers announce index changes.
